title: Fruit Salad Friends
lrc:
[00:00.00]Apple, banana, orange, grape,
[00:04.00]Strawberry, pear — what a shape!
[00:08.00]Toss them all in a great big bowl,
[00:12.00]Fruit salad friends — that's the goal!
[00:16.00]I like apples, I like pears,
[00:20.00]Sweet little fruits everywhere!
[00:24.00]Banana yellow, grape so blue,
[00:28.00]I like fruit and so do you!
[00:32.00]Strawberry red, orange round,
[00:36.00]Juicy flavors all around!
[00:40.00]Mix them up and share a plate,
[00:44.00]Fruit salad friends taste so great!
[00:48.00]I like apples, I like pears,
[00:52.00]Sweet little fruits everywhere!
[00:56.00]Apple, banana, orange, grape,
[01:00.00]Strawberry, pear — fruit-salad shape!
